name: Greggs PLC
description: The UK's leading food-on-the-go retailer with 2,618 shops, specialising in freshly prepared bakery food and hot drinks. Zero debt, heavy reinvestment in store rollout.

assumptions.revenueDrivers: New store openings (~150 net pa, targeting 3,000+), like-for-like growth from evening daypart, delivery, and menu innovation. FY2024 revenue £2,014m (+11.3%).
assumptions.marginDrivers: Underlying operating margin ~9.7% in FY2024. Supply chain efficiencies from new manufacturing capacity. Food cost inflation moderating. Wage pressure a headwind.
assumptions.risks: Heavy capex programme (£249m in FY2024) depresses traditional FCF during growth phase. Consumer spending pressure, food cost inflation, labour costs, cannibalisation risk from rapid rollout.
assumptions.catalyst: Store count approaching 3,000 target, evening trade expansion, delivery penetration, supply chain investment payback. FCF will expand as capex intensity normalises post-rollout.
